sources.fertility: UN World Population Prospects (2024), via Our World in Data
sources.birthsOutsideMarriage: OECD Family Database / UN, via Our World in Data
sources.marriageRate: UN / OECD crude marriage rate, via Our World in Data
sources.completedFertility: Human Fertility Database (completed cohort fertility), via Our World in Data
sources.onePersonHouseholds: UN / national censuses (share of one-person households), via Our World in Data
sources.realHousePrices: BIS real residential property prices (index, 2010=100), via FRED
sources.churchAttendance: World Values Survey / EVS (frequent religious attendance), via Our World in Data
sources.shareWomenMarried: UN World Marriage Data (women 15-49 married or in a union), via Our World in Data
sources.maritalFertility: Eurostat demo_fagec + demo_pjanmarsta (% of married women 18-49 giving birth/yr), computed
sources.nonMaritalFertility: Eurostat demo_fagec + demo_pjanmarsta (% of unmarried women 18-49 giving birth/yr), computed
